classes.reasoning: Document explicitly identifies itself as 'CLINICAL STUDY REPORT — FINAL' in the header and contains complete trial narrative including synopsis, patient disposition, safety data, efficacy endpoints, and conclusions prepared for regulatory purposes.

trial_title: A Phase II, Randomized, Double-Blind, Placebo-Controlled Study of BRC-883 (Cardanezumab) in Statin-Intolerant HeFH Patients
indication: Heterozygous Familial Hypercholesterolemia (HeFH) in statin-intolerant patients
summary: This is the final Clinical Study Report for protocol BIORCE-CAR-2022-005, a Phase II randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled trial of BRC-883 (Cardanezumab) in statin-intolerant heterozygous familial hypercholesterolemia patients. The report presents complete efficacy and safety results from 148 patients with data cut-off 30 November 2023, demonstrating that BRC-883 met its primary endpoint with a -57.3% LDL-C reduction and a favorable safety profile supporting Phase III development.
